title: Use eager mx.eval() to fix running train script on 16GB Mac devices
author: sandsevenone

data.description: Enabled eager mx.eval() during chunked loss/grad computation to materialize the loss/gradient graph for each microbatch, reducing memory usage and preventing crashes on 16GB Mac devices.

novel_contributions: Forced eager evaluation of loss/grad graphs per sub-batch to avoid MLX building the full computation graph during warmup.
Fixed train-script crashes on 16GB Mac devices while keeping default settings otherwise unchanged.
